source_name: Retail pump price - diesel multi-state average
notes: Multi-state diesel average weighted by station count. QLD: 1025 stations, avg 259.0 c/L, source date 2026-04-30; WA: 682 stations, avg 232.7 c/L, source date 2026-06-01. NSW contributes only when NSW_FUELCHECK_API_KEY is configured.
source_rights: Mixed state government terms; verify each source before reuse
citation: NSW FuelCheck; Queensland Government Open Data Fuel Price Reporting; WA FuelWatch.

states.detail: Queensland Open Data diesel latest public monthly file: Queensland Fuel Prices April 2026
